reasoning: The button occupies warm-earthy territory: parchment/tan background (#CFC5A5 range) + sunset-orange icon body + warm-brown rim accents. Overall: warm and harmonious within its own earthy register, shadows philosophically correct, but insufficient chromatic breadth and saturation punch to score as a full pass against the BRIGHT Echoes-tuned target palette.
